title: Resolution Unanimously Endorsing to the Office of the Mayor to Distribute All the Emergency Subsidy From the National Government in the Form of ?cash Assistance? to Affected Individuals and Families Pursuant to Dbm Local Budget Circular No. 136 and the Dilg-dswd-dnd Joint Memorandum Circular No. 1 Series of 2021. (author: Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Cris Dayril B. Bagne
